commands.review_summary:
The PR adds provider-normalizable runtime tool schema filtering and quarantine before embedded agent attempts and compaction provider normalization, with diagnostics and regression tests.

PR surface: Source +219, Tests +253. Total +472 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main normalizes active and bundled tools before the final runtime schema filter, while the PR tests exercise circular/unreadable schemas before session setup and provider normalization. I did not run a live broken-plugin repro in this read-only review.

target.title: fix(agents): quarantine invalid runtime tool schemas
target.body:
## Summary

- Quarantines malformed active runtime tool schemas before provider normalization and model-session setup in normal assistant attempts and compaction.
- Adds a shared runtime quarantine helper that logs dropped tools, emits `unsupported_tool_schema` diagnostics, and preserves healthy sibling tools.
- Keeps provider-repairable schemas available for provider normalization while filtering non-serializable schemas and unreadable tool descriptors/rows that can poison setup.

## Verification

- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --write --threads=1 <touched files>`
- `git diff --check`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/agents/tool-schema-projection.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-quarantine.ts src/agents/tool-schema-quarantine.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compact.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compact.hooks.harness.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compact.hooks.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/tool-schema-projection.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-quarantine.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compact.hooks.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts` passed 2 routed Vitest shards: 7 unit-fast tests and 124 agent tests.
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` initially found the unreadable-descriptor regression from over-pruning; after the fix, rerun reported no accepted/actionable findings.
- `OPENCLAW_TESTBOX=1 node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider blacksmith-testbox --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"` was blocked by missing Blacksmith auth.
- `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"` passed on AWS Crabbox run `run_1c20e884cfd6`, lease `cbx_852acfa34c68` / `jade-lobster`, command time 8m23s, total 10m29s.
- Touched-file scrub for reported fixture names, private paths, and install-error output returned no matches.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: a bad active runtime tool schema, unreadable tool descriptor, unreadable tool row, or circular/non-serializable compaction tool schema should not crash assistant setup or compaction before content/diagnostics.

Real environment tested: linked `gwt` worktree on current `origin/main`, focused local Vitest through the repo router, local oxlint on touched files, autoreview, and AWS Crabbox `pnpm check:changed` on synced dirty checkout.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"`.

Evidence after fix: focused tests cover unsupported schemas, provider-repairable schemas, unreadable descriptors/rows, quarantine logging without re-reading hostile rows, assistant attempt filtering before session setup, and compaction quarantine before provider normalization.

Observed result after fix: healthy tools remain available while malformed or unreadable active tools are filtered and logged before provider/model projection can abort the turn.

What was not tested: live Telegram/UI turn with a real broken external plugin. Doctor validation is handled by follow-up PR #88493.
